# Class: ResponseAccessor

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/result/response.ts:12](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/result/response.ts#L12)

Read-only accessor for an HTTP response.

Assertions go through `expect()`:
`expect(result.response).toMatch('created.http')` compares status,
a subset of headers, and the JSON body against `expected/<name>` —
with `{{placeholder}}` support in all three.

## Constructors

### Constructor

```ts
new ResponseAccessor(
   response, 
   testDir, 
   captures?): ResponseAccessor;
```
